title: Eva Imaginary
html:
The Evangelion Imaginary, also called the Eva Imaginary or Imaginary Eva, is a fictitious Evangelion theorized by Dr. Katsuragi. Shinji's memories cause it to manifest in the form of a black Lilith nailed to a cross. Gendo uses the twin Spears of Cassius and Longinus to fuse with it and create a being that visually evokes the Rei-Lilith ("Giant Naked Rei") being from End of Evangelion in order to cause Additional Impact to proceed according to his own desires for Human Instrumentality. It eventually disintegrates in a manner very similar to that of Rei-Lilith, and its disintegration occurs simultaneously with turning the numerous headless Evas back into their constituent original lifeforms.



This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

Article: Eva Imaginary
The Evangelion Imaginary, also called the Eva Imaginary or Imaginary Eva, is a fictitious Evangelion theorized by Dr. Katsuragi. Shinji's memories cause it to manifest in the form of a black Lilith nailed to a cross. Gendo uses the twin Spears of Cassius and Longinus to fuse with it and create a being that visually evokes the Rei-Lilith ("Giant Naked Rei") being from End of Evangelion in order to cause Additional Impact to proceed according to his own desires for Human Instrumentality. It eventually disintegrates in a manner very similar to that of Rei-Lilith, and its disintegration occurs simultaneously with turning the numerous headless Evas back into their constituent original lifeforms.
